title: centaurea cithaeronea
intro: Centaurea cithaeronea, also known as the Lesser Scabious, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurea cithaeronea include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
